name_en: Kaikoji Temple
description_en: A monument classified as a place of scenic beauty, Kaikoji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

description_en: A monument classified as a place of scenic beauty, the Hikarigaoka pine forest. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

description_en: A monument classified as a place of scenic beauty, Hiyoriyama Park. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the natural habitat of mube vine on Tobishima Island. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1975-04-11.

description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the natural habitat of creeping juniper on Tobishima Island. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1975-04-11.

description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the machilus (tabu) forest at Miyatani on Tobishima Island. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1975-04-11.

description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the sacred grove of Takamori Shrine on Tobishima Island. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1975-04-11.

name_en: Futamata Island
description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, Futamata Island. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1975-04-11.

description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, comprising the islands of Meshima, Eboshijima, Nishishima, and Futamijima. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1975-04-11.

name_en: Kobayashi Fudo Cedar
description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the Kobayashi Fudo cedar tree. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1980-04-28.

description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the Kobo nutmeg-yew (kaya) tree. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1992-03-26.

name_en: Cedars in the Precincts of Aizawa Shrine
description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the cedar trees in the precincts of Aizawa Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1997-03-12.

name_en: Enma Hall of Sekiunji Temple (formerly the Kannon Hall)
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of structures, the Enma hall of Sekiunji Temple, formerly the Kannon hall. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Motoaikai, Shinjo City. It was designated on 2002-05-15.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of structures, the main hall and worship hall of Kumano Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Tobita, Shinjo City. It was designated on 2022-03-29.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of structures, Hachiman Shrine, a precinct shrine within Kumano Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Tobita, Shinjo City. It was designated on 2022-03-29.

name_en: Mountain Gate of Emmanji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of structures, the mountain gate (sanmon) of Emmanji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Itsukamachi, Shinjo City. It was designated on 2022-03-29.

name_en: Thunder God Hall of Emmanji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of structures, the thunder god hall (Raijindo) of Emmanji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Itsukamachi, Shinjo City. It was designated on 2022-03-29.

name_en: Kannon Hall of Chosenji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of structures, the Kannon hall of Chosenji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Teppomachi, Shinjo City. It was designated on 2022-03-29.

name_romaji: Shihon chakushoku Shinjō han ryōnai ezu

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of painting, a colored folding screen depicting the sixteen arhats of Chosen on paper. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Teppomachi, Shinjo City. It was designated on 2001-06-14.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of sculpture, a wooden seated statue of Amida Nyorai. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Shimokanazawamachi, Shinjo City. It was designated on 1971-09-01.

name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Monju Bosatsu
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of sculpture, a wooden seated statue of Monju Bosatsu. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Teppomachi, Shinjo City. It was designated on 1971-09-01.

name_en: Wooden Statues of the Amida Triad
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of sculpture, wooden statues of the Amida triad. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Shimokanazawamachi, Shinjo City. It was designated on 2019-02-21.

name_en: Standing Statues of Kannon Bosatsu and Seishi Bosatsu
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of sculpture, standing statues of Kannon Bosatsu and Seishi Bosatsu. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Shimokanazawamachi, Shinjo City. It was designated on 2020-02-21.

name_en: Three-Tiered Hat Battle Standard of the Tozawa Family

name_en: Spear Made by Minamoto no Nagatsune
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of crafts, a spear made by Minamoto no Nagatsune. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1973-04-09.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of crafts, kamaya-weave hanging Buddhas (kakebotoke) depicting the thirty-three Kannon. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Shinjo City, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Teppomachi, Shinjo City. It was designated on 1979-10-29.

name_romaji: Shinjō han jūichidai hanshu Tozawa Masazane hitsu Meirindō
